entities.description: Social and economic attributes of the farm households

entities.description: The total money earned by farm households

entities.description: The nutritional status and dietary patterns of households

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEM TYPE
entities.description: The specific agricultural system used by households

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD WEALTH STATUS
entities.description: The economic standing of households categorized by wealth

entities.name: MENNISA
entities.description: A remote location in Ethiopia representing root crops-based farming

entities.name: WELMEL TIQA
entities.description: A remote location in Ethiopia representing maize-based semi-pastoral farming

entities.name: AGAM WUHA
entities.description: A remote location in Ethiopia representing teff-based cereal farming

entities.description: Crops that grow underground, used as a basis for farming in Mennisa

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal grain used as a basis for semi-pastoral farming in Welmel Tiqa

entities.name: TEFF
entities.description: A cereal grain used as a basis for farming in Agam Wuha

entities.description: Techniques used to gather data for the study

entities.description: Method used to select 265 smallholder households

entities.description: Tool used for data collection from households

entities.name: STANDARD STATISTICAL TESTS
entities.description: Statistical methods used to analyze data

entities.name: TOBIT REGRESSION ANALYSES
entities.description: A specific statistical model used to analyze the data

entities.name: FOOD VARIETY SCORE
entities.description: A metric used to assess the diversity of food consumed

entities.description: The number of people in a household

entities.description: The condition of having reliable access to nutritious food
